description: Agent closes ticket without addressing the stated issue — template response, minimal handle time, no investigation
Agent selects wrong issue category or subcategory — right team, wrong classification
Ticket sent to a team that does not handle this type of issue
Agent applies a standard operating procedure that does not fit the situation — correct SOP for other cases, wrong for this one
Agent attempts fix outside scope to avoid escalation metric hit — issue requires handoff but agent resolves or closes instead
